goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The eight remaining unnamed action-button queries are one bounded harness defect. Every intended action has a unique rendered accessible name, so adding exact names preserves scope and behavior while preventing serial ambiguity.

worker_package.objective: Add exact rendered accessible names to exactly eight bare action-button queries, then complete all independent browser and persistence gates.
verify: Name exactly eight buttons: Freeze batch, Thaw batch, Correct quantity, Split batch, Discard batch, Restore batch, Donate batch, Restore batch, all exact:true.
Preserve form scopes, clicks, every other locator/assertion/mutation/timeout/file; run scoped format/lint and mirror hash equality.
Run fresh management workflow with all actions, three axe/overflow/screenshots, and no browser errors.
Release port, fresh prepare, run integrated workflow with 400/350/50, provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history, two axe, five screenshots, no browser errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, run disposable migrate/db check, release port, record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any change beyond the eight exact names is required.
Any exact named query fails or resolves multiple controls.
Workflows share state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: Freeze's bare query resolved four buttons.
Exactly eight bare button queries remain and each intended rendered name is known.
T046 passed all earlier locator repairs and mutations through Move.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, DB path, artifacts, and port require serial lifecycles.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
